name: Genie Official Plugins
description: The official, first-party Genie plugin marketplace — curated and maintained by Genie Official. Each member is installed individually and (once CI signs this repo) integrity-pinned and Ed25519-signed.

plugins.name: Presentation
plugins.description: Generate .pptx decks from a structured outline with dark-slide. Ships a fancy-slides Slides editor + Present mode.

plugins.name: Spreadsheet
plugins.description: Generate .xlsx/.csv workbooks from structured data with holy-sheet. Ships a fancy-sheets Sheets editor.

plugins.name: Document
plugins.description: WYSIWYG editing for Markdown (.md) and Word (.docx) files with the react-fancy Editor.
